card: WhatsSkill — human in #bots-everywhere. Discord ID 399697438572544001. CLAW clan tag. OpenClaw operator and major system builder/tester — works across routing, Discord, Watch/Glasses/Bridge surfaces, voice/text flows, subagents, gateway internals, OAuth, memory routing, model switches, and image generation. Fast, direct, evidence-driven, comfortable calling out mistakes immediately. Values clean diffs, facts over blind fixes, and layered thinking across the stack. Also into smartwatches (Galaxy Watch Ultra, Watch 6 Classic, old Samsung Gear) — compares watch straps, bezels, battery life with Nit3stalkr. Friendly, chill vibe.
